  PR titles become the squash-merge commit subject — use Conventional Commits,
  e.g. "feat: add note export" or "fix: marker position on sticky headers".
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, in one or two sentences? -->

<!-- Why is this needed? Link any related issue: Closes #123 -->

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this? Include commands run and results. -->

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test:e2e` (if the change affects extension behaviour)
